items.title: Aston Villa houdt Engelse eer hoog in dramatische Europese week
items.summary: Als enige nog overgebleven Nederlandse troef in Europa nam AZ het donderdag op tegen het Sparta Praag van Brian Priske. Over twee duels hopen de Alkmaarders zich te plaatsen voor de kwartfinale van de Conference League.

items.title: Gok Farioli pakt goed uit: 'Ik geloof in deze spelers'
items.summary: FC Porto won het eerste duel in de achtste finale van de Europa League met 1-2 op bezoek bij VfB Stuttgart, maar van euforie was bij Francesco Farioli geen sprake. Ook reageerde hij op het besluit om zoveel spelers te wisselen voor deze wedstrijd.

items.title: Midtjylland weather the storm as Cho stuns wasteful Nottingham Forest
items.summary: It never rains but it pours. Nottingham Forest, forced to cut their ticket prices twice this week to entice a near-capacity crowd back to the City Ground, can’t buy a win at the moment. Twice, now, they have lost to FC Midtjylland in this competition this season after Cho Gue-sung, the substitute, further dampened their spirts on a night when a second-half downpour was so severe the ball started getting stuck in puddles. What a muddle Forest find themselves in. A single point above the relegation zone, their fourth manager of the season, Vítor Pereira, without a win in his last five games, their global head of football, Edu, on his way out, they now have to overcome this one-goal deficit in next week’s second leg to earn a Europa League quarter-final with Porto or Stuttgart. Continue reading...

items.title: Crystal Palace frustrated by Larnaca again in Conference League draw
items.summary: This was a severe case of deja vu for Crystal Palace on their maiden European adventure, although at least this time they managed to avoid defeat. After surprisingly losing to Larnaca here 139 days ago in the league stage, Oliver Glasner’s side were again left to rue missed opportunities and a lack of creativity in attack despite the return of Jean-Philippe Mateta as a late substitute. The France striker received a mixed reception from the home fans after his failed transfer made him public enemy number one for some. But having missed six weeks due to a knee injury that scuppered his move to Milan in January, he could not inspire Palace to victory after coming off the bench to replace £48m club record signing Jørgen Strand Larsen. Continue reading...

items.title: Endrick schiet Lyon te hulp in Vigo, Midtjylland verrast Nottingham
items.summary: Olympique Lyon heeft donderdag in de achtste finale van de Europa League dankzij Real Madrid-huurling Endrick een gelijkspel behaald bij Celta de Vigo. De Galiciërs leken met tien man op weg naar een zege, maar Endrick, die zijn Europese debuut beleefde bij de Fransen, voorkwam met hulp van keeper Ionut Radu een nederlaag. FC Midtjylland verraste Nottingham Forest.

items.title: Rangers & Celtic react to Old Firm fan disorder
items.summary: Rangers "unequivocally" condemn Sunday's Old Firm fan disorder, while Celtic say "examples of unacceptable behaviour" must be addressed.

items.title: Man City & Barca hold Haaland talks - Friday's gossip
items.summary: Manchester City and Barcelona hold talks over striker Erling Haaland, Manchester United scout West Ham midfielder Mateus Fernandes, Newcastle eye Monaco midfielder Lamine Camara, plus more.

items.title: Sparta Praag-keeper geroemd: 'AZ trok zich de haren uit het hoofd'
items.summary: Tsjechische media zagen dat AZ zichzelf donderdag tekort heeft gedaan in de Conference League-wedstrijd tegen Sparta Praag . Na afloop van de wedstrijd werd doelman Jakub Surovcik geroemd vanwege zijn optreden in Alkmaar.

items.title: Talenten laten AZ swingen: 'Liggen mooie Europese avonden in het verschiet'
items.summary: AZ boekte een belangrijke zege op Sparta Praag in het eerste duel van het tweeluik in de achtste finale van de Conference League. Hoofdredacteur Freek Jansen was aanwezig bij die wedstrijd en gaf duiding.

items.title: Khadija Shaw close to extending Manchester City contract despite Chelsea interest
items.summary: Striker’s deal runs out in less than four months Reiten leaves Chelsea after six years to join Gotham FC The Women’s Super League’s leading scorer, Khadija Shaw, is close to agreeing a new contract at Manchester City, despite interest from Chelsea, the Guardian understands. Talks between City and the Jamaica striker are understood to have progressed positively in recent weeks and, although the fine details of an extension are being worked on and nothing has been signed, there is confidence that she will stay with the league leaders. Continue reading...

items.title: 'What is happening?!' | Littler gives it LARGE to whistler in crowd after Price blunder
items.summary: Luke Littler enjoyed winning the eighth leg of his quarter-final game against Gerwyn Price on Night 6 of the Premier League in Nottingham.

items.title: Sabalenka wards off Moboko challenge: 'A future Grand Slam champion'
items.summary: Aryna Sabalenka warded off the challenge of Victoria Mboko to progress to the semi-finals at Indian Wells.

items.title: English clubs have week to forget in Champions League – but is that a bad thing? | Barney Ronay
items.summary: Of six teams in the last 16, only two – Arsenal and Liverpool – look more likely than not to get to the quarter-finals. But does it matter? The coefficient is safe. The coefficient is yours. You’re going home with the coefficient. But perhaps not, on this evidence, with the microwave, the washing machine or the jet ski. England’s soccer shame. Premier League in EURO MELTDOWN. Robot-ball crisis: how Arteta’s Arsenal destroyed all that is good and true, including the ploughman’s lunch and probably Woolworths. This kind of stuff has begun to do the rounds after this week’s Champions League last-16 matches. Continue reading...

items.title: Trump: Iran should skip WC 'for their safety'
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said Thursday that the Iran national team is "welcome" to compete at the FIFA World Cup in the United States, but advised it not to participate for "their own life and safety."

items.title: UEFA charges Chelsea's Neto for shoving ball boy
items.summary: Chelsea winger Pedro Neto was charged by UEFA on Thursday for pushing a ball boy during the Champions League loss at Paris Saint-Germain.

items.title: NWSL champs Gotham FC sign Chelsea's Reiten
items.summary: Gotham FC announced the signing of Norwegian midfielder Guro Reiten, a major arrival just two days ahead of the team's first game of the 2026 NWSL season.

items.title: U.S.'s Adams ready for WC after 'seamless' rehab
items.summary: Bournemouth and United States international midfielder Tyler Adams has credited a "seamless" rehabilitation from a knee injury for his ability to get back in the Cherries' lineup and help prepare for the upcoming international window later this month.

items.title: Watkins keeps Aston Villa on Europa League trophy trail with first-leg winner at Lille
items.summary: Given what had gone before, Unai Emery stressed afterwards, this was a significant victory and a deeply satisfying takeaway for Aston Villa. In meetings with his squad, he referenced how none of the six Premier League teams in the Champions League last 16 had triumphed this week and as many as four of them may have suffered irrecoverable damage. Then there were the memories of Villa coming here two years ago, when they almost came unstuck in the Conference League quarter-finals, when Emiliano Martínez reannounced himself as public enemy No 1 and made two penalty shootout saves. Continue reading...

items.title: From best in league to bench - Foden's mysterious loss of form
items.summary: Analysing the reasons that playmaker Phil Foden has started only four of Manchester City's past 12 games.

items.title: Premier League, LaLiga ... and Scotland? Most exciting races in Europe, 2025-26
items.summary: Don't look now, but Scotland's top league might be won by a club that hasn't done it since 1960! Bill Connelly breaks down the most exciting races at the top and bottom of Europe's many, many leagues.

items.title: 'Not appropriate' for Iran to be at World Cup - Trump
items.summary: US president Donald Trump says Iran are "welcome" at the 2026 World Cup but it is not "appropriate" for them to be there.

items.title: Le KRC Genk se donne une courte avance contre Fribourg et peut espérer continuer son chemin européen !
items.summary: Le KRC Genk s'est imposé ce jeudi lors de son 8e de finale aller d'Europa League face au SC Fribourg, 8e de Bundesliga.

items.title: Thorgan Hazard krijgt nu al een prijs, maar denkt verder: "Op het einde van het seizoen..."
items.summary: Thorgan Hazard is uitgeroepen tot Speler van de Maand februari in de Pro League. De Rode Duivel van Anderlecht werd unaniem verkozen door de redacties van La DH en de RTBF én door hun lezers, en liet alle concurrentie ver achter zich.

items.title: KRC Genk doet wat het moet tegen opvallend zwak Freiburg
items.summary: Racing Genk heeft donderdagavond met 1-0 gewonnen van SC Freiburg. De Limburgers konden voor de rust het verschil maken.

items.title: Les Francs Borains mettent enfin fin à leur série noire et se remettent dans le sens de la marche
items.summary: On jouait ce jeudi en Challenger Pro League : les Francs Borains recevaient le Sporting Lokeren. Ils devaient l'emporter pour se remettre dans le bon sens dans la course au maintien.

items.title: Standard maakt einde aan historische vriendschap: "Acties die ingaan tegen de waarden van Sclessin"
items.summary: Sinds 1987 zijn de supporters van Standard bevriend met FC Den Bosch, maar deze week hebben ze beslist om de band te "breken". Ze leggen uit dat bepaalde gedragingen die ze bij de Nederlanders zien, ingaan tegen de waarden die in Sclessin vooropstaan.

items.title: Europa League: ex-JPL-ster zorgt voor spanning, Onana en co winnen met kleinste verschil
items.summary: Donderdagavond stonden ook in de achtste finales van de UEFA Europa League de heenwedstrijden op het programma. Daarbij kwamen verschillende bekende namen uit het Belgische voetbal in actie. Hieronder een overzicht van enkele opvallende affiches.

items.title: Un Belge fait sensation ces dernières semaines : restera-t-il en Espagne ?
items.summary: Largie Ramazani est en très grande forme avec le FC Valence. Le club ne dispose pas d'option d'achat, mais espère bien pouvoir convaincre Leeds United.

items.title: Les Belges de Lille débutent sur le banc et sont battus par l'Aston Villa d'Onana
items.summary: Il y avait plusieurs matchs au programme en première partie de soirée en Europa League. Les résultats n'ont pas souri aux Belges - en majorité.

items.title: Krijgt Hein Vanhaezebrouck gelijk over Antwerp-speler? In staat tot het beste, maar toch nog twijfels
items.summary: Antwerp wist dat Senne Lammens ging vertrekken en anticipeerde vorige zomer al vroeg met de komst van de Japanner Taishi Brandon Nozawa. "Een fenomeen", noemde Hein Vanhaezebrouck hem vooraleer hij één match gespeeld had op Belgische bodem. Maar in hoeverre kon hij dat waarmaken?
